title: Man Rescued 8 Days After Quake, a Ray of Joy in Stricken Venezuela
summary_full: The 44-year-old security guard was pulled alive from a pancaked basement, offering a fleeting moment of hope amid a soaring death toll.
summary_public: The 44-year-old security guard was pulled alive from a pancaked basement, offering a fleeting moment of hope amid a soaring death toll.
